title: The True Paxels
body:
# Mine everything with one tool! 
Paxels are universal tools that work like a pickaxe, axe, shovel and hoe - all at the same time!
## Features
- **Paxels can be crafted from several materials**: Wooden, Stone, Copper, Iron, Diamond and Netherite
- Paxels can mine stone, ores, wood, dirt, leaves... basically anything you can think of
- Paxels can also **make dirt paths, make a farmland _(while sneaking)_ or strip wood**!
- **Configurable** durability for each paxel
## Compatibility
- Works for:
  -  **Fabric 1.20.1 and above**
  -  **Forge 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1 and above**
  -  **NeoForge 1.21.1, 1.21.11, 26.1 and above**
- May conflict with Vein Miner-type mods _(has not been tested)_
## Issues & Feedback
If you find any issues, report them on our [Github issues page](https://github.com/JustErikSK/TheTruePaxels-Mod/issues) for this mod

If you would like me to port the mod to other version, feel free to let me know. I don't plan to port it to versions older than 1.20.1 tho as there's already enough good mods with paxels.

![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6907e86aad55d3518d34c37a13e3addb723228_0.webp)

**Check out my other projects at my [website](https://withrage.com/)!**
